day4_lunch_start.name: 私
day4_lunch_start.text: *昼休み。ユナの空いた席がずっと目に焼きつく。*

day4_lunch_start_2.name: 私
day4_lunch_start_2.text: *『転校した』なんて信じられない。昨日までここにいたのに。*

day4_lunch_start_3.name: 私
day4_lunch_start_3.text: *Yuna. I need to find Yuna. I can't believe 'she suddenly transferred.'*

day4_lunch_start_4.name: 私
day4_lunch_start_4.text: *Or... the nurse's office. Riin's medicine. I need to find out what it is.*

day4_lunch_start_5.name: 私
day4_lunch_start_5.text: *There's also the rooftop. What Seolhwa said in the dream. There might be clues there.*

day4_lunch_search_yuna.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_yuna.text: *廊下を歩き回る。ユナがよく行っていた場所……写真部の教室。*

day4_lunch_search_2.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_2.text: *写真部の教室のドアが開いている。中には誰もいない。*

day4_lunch_search_3.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_3.text: *ユナのロッカー。開けてみた。空っぽだ……一つを除いて。*

day4_lunch_search_4.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_4.text: *小型カメラが一台。ロッカーの隅に隠されていた。ユナが残したものに違いない。*

day4_lunch_search_5.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_5.text: *カメラをポケットに入れた。……突然、廊下から足音が。*

day4_lunch_search_6.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_6.text: *振り返った。廊下の奥に誰かが立っていて……消えた。急いで教室に戻る。*

day4_lunch_search_7.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_7.text: *Yuna's locker. A sticker with her number was on it. 'Choi Yuna.' The sticker is half peeled off. Signs someone tried to pull it off.*

day4_lunch_search_8.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_8.text: *I opened the locker. ...Empty. No bag, no textbooks, no photos... All gone. As if nobody had ever used it.*

day4_lunch_search_9.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_9.text: *It's clean. **Too** clean. Not a speck of dust. Someone 'tidied' this. Two days ago Yuna was showing me photos from this locker. This locker that was covered in cat photos... empty like it was factory reset.*

day4_lunch_search_10.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_10.text: *...Wait. The floor of the locker. The panel is very slightly lifted. I pried up the edge with my fingernail. A false bottom.*

day4_lunch_search_11.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_11.text: *Something wedged in the gap. It's Yuna's camera. Deliberately hidden under the panel. She calculated that whoever emptied the locker wouldn't pry up the floor. ...Left for someone to find. For me.*

day4_lunch_search_12.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_12.text: *I turned on the camera. The battery indicator blinks. Nearly empty. Only one last photo appears on the screen.*

day4_lunch_search_13.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_13.text: *...Stairs heading underground. Dark stairs. Somewhere in the old building. A place you can't see.*

day4_lunch_search_14.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_14.text: *In the corner of the photo there's handwriting. 'Under here — Yu.' Yuna's final message.*

day4_lunch_search_15.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_15.text: *The camera shut off. Battery dead. ...But it's enough.*

day4_lunch_search_16.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_16.text: *Yuna didn't 'suddenly transfer.' Yuna found something, and so —*

day4_lunch_search_17.name: 私
day4_lunch_search_17.text: *...The basement. Somewhere in this school there's a basement.*

day4_lunch_nurse.name: 保健教師
day4_lunch_nurse.text: "あら、{name}。また来たのね。今日はどこが具合悪いの？"

day4_lunch_nurse_2.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_2.text: *保健室の片隅に施錠されたキャビネットが見える。以前はなかった南京錠がかかっている。*

day4_lunch_nurse_3.name: 保健教師
day4_lunch_nurse_3.text: "昨日飲んだドリンクの効果はどう？ ……よく眠れてる？"

day4_lunch_nurse_4.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_4.text: *リインにユナのことを聞いてみようか？*
choices: ユナがどこに行ったか聞く

day4_lunch_nurse_5.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_5.text: *A transparent liquid. The syringe graduations are precisely calibrated. Practiced movements.*

day4_lunch_nurse_6.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_6.text: *...She stops when she sees me. Her shoulders visibly stiffen.*

day4_lunch_nurse_8.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_8.text: *She quickly puts the syringe in a drawer. Smiles. But her hands are trembling.*

day4_lunch_nurse_11.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_11.text: *Nurse Riin approaches. She's about to put her hand on my forehead. ...This hand was just holding the syringe. What was she putting in that syringe?*

day4_lunch_nurse_timer.name: カン・リイン
day4_lunch_nurse_timer.text: "No fever. How was the drink you had yesterday? ...Sleeping well?"

day4_lunch_nurse_ask.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_ask.text: "I heard Yuna... transferred suddenly. Last night."

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_2.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_2.text: *Nurse Riin's expression shifted very slightly. 0.3 seconds. Very briefly.*

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_3.name: カン・リイン
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_3.text: "...Yuna? Oh, Choi Yuna. I see. That was sudden."

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_4.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_4.text: "Did Yuna come by the nurse's office yesterday?"

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_6.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_6.text: *Nurse Riin looks at me. She's smiling, but her eyes aren't.*

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_7.name: カン・リイン
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_7.text: "...Why are you staring like that? {name}, you're not having strange thoughts, are you?"

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_8.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_8.text: *Her voice went cold. Just for a moment. Then softened again.*

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_9.name: カン・リイン
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_9.text: "Yuna will be fine. She went back to her original school. There's nothing to worry about."

day4_lunch_nurse_ask_10.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_ask_10.text: *'Nothing to worry about.' Ms. Eunsu said the same thing. So did Sea. Nurse Riin's hand is trembling again. ...The hand closing the cabinet. Medicine bottles clink inside. Is this person also fighting something? Or... is she observing me?*

day4_lunch_nurse_silent.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_silent.text: *I said nothing. Nurse Riin watches me quietly.*

day4_lunch_nurse_silent_2.name: カン・リイン
day4_lunch_nurse_silent_2.text: "...Should I give you medicine? For the headache."

day4_lunch_nurse_silent_3.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_silent_3.text: *The teacher takes medicine out of a drawer. Two white pills. ...Should I take these? Seolhwa said: 'They gave medicine. Medicine to erase memories.'*

day4_lunch_nurse_silent_4.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_silent_4.text: "It's fine. I think I'll get better with some rest."

day4_lunch_nurse_silent_6.name: 私
day4_lunch_nurse_silent_6.text: *Nurse Riin puts the medicine back in the drawer. I can see the syringe she put in there earlier. I looked away. Pretended I didn't see. ...My heart is beating too fast.*

day4_lunch_rooftop.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop.text: *屋上。昨日ユナと来た場所。風が冷たい。*

day4_lunch_rooftop_2.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_2.text: *手すりの下に何か刻まれている。刃物で削ったような文字。*

day4_lunch_rooftop_3.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_3.text: *『ここから出る方法は一つ。 — イ・ソルファ』……ソルファが残したものだ。*

day4_lunch_rooftop_4.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_4.text: *……方法は一つ？ どんな方法？*

day4_lunch_rooftop_5.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_5.text: *急に寒くなった。急いで降りる。*

day4_lunch_rooftop_6.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_6.text: *Something is carved under the railing. Letters scratched as if with a knife. Rusted. It looks old. 'There is only one way out. — Lee Seolhwa'*

day4_lunch_rooftop_7.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_7.text: *...Seolhwa carved this. One year ago. I traced the letters with my finger. She carved deep. Put force into it. Desperately.*

day4_lunch_rooftop_8.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_8.text: *'Only one way out.' ...What is it? Escape? Or... There's even smaller writing underneath. Barely visible. 'The answer is in the basement'*

day4_lunch_rooftop_9.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_9.text: *The basement. Yuna's camera also had stairs leading underground in the photo.*

day4_lunch_rooftop_10.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_10.text: *On the rooftop floor there's a single cherry blossom petal. Rustling slightly in the breeze. ...It's not cherry blossom season now. I saw this on the morning of day 3 in the corridor too.*

day4_lunch_rooftop_11.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_11.text: *Seolhwa's traces. Evidence that Seolhwa was here. Even when everything else is erased... this remains. I put the cherry blossom petal in my pocket. ...I felt like I should take it with me.*

day4_lunch_rooftop_12.name: 私
day4_lunch_rooftop_12.text: *...The basement. I need to find it after school. Those stairs that Yuna photographed.*

day4_lunch_end.name: 私
day4_lunch_end.text: *午後の授業が始まる。心臓が破裂しそうだ。*
